title: Beef and Vegetable Stir Fry
description: Quick and easy beef stir fry with a variety of vegetables and a hint of greek flavor.

ingredients.name: Flaky Pastry Dough (for Beef and Onion Pinwheels)

instructions: Season beef with salt and pepper. Cook in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Set aside.
Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch. Cut into 4 equal rectangles.
In a bowl, mix together the Greek yogurt and stir-fry sauce. Spread a tablespoon of this mixture on each pastry rectangle, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Arrange a few slices of beef on each pastry rectangle, followed by some sliced onions and bell peppers.
Fold the pastry in half to form a pinwheel shape and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the pinwheels with a little bit of fry oil.
Bake the pinwheels in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until they're golden brown.
